summary: The batch implemented the planned interface-first contract skeleton. No canonical graph or package spec changes are requested.
deferred_items: Define first smart component manifest schema examples before runtime registry implementation.
Define backend render strategy batches before production renderer behavior.
Define hydration metadata schema and browser smoke matrix before frontend runtime.
Align UI asset graph handoff with core.assets before asset resolution runtime.
Define design pack and resource pack import/export fixtures before activation runtime.
